subcodes.first_line: O Ghulám! The gaze of God is directed toward thee from the horizon of this Prison. Strive that, in thy youth, thou mayest achieve and be illumined with a heavenly character
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای غلام طرف الله از افق سجن بتو ناظر جهد نما که در جوانی باخلاق رحمانی و انوار
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
